assignments.name: converted_categories
assignments.value:
={{ JSON.stringify(
  $json.apps.categories
    .filter(id => String(id).startsWith("7") || String(id).startsWith("game_"))
    .map(id => {
      const mapping = {

        "7001": "Action",
        "7002": "Adventure",
        "7003": "Casual",
        "7004": "Board",
        "7005": "Card",
        "7006": "Casino",
        "7009": "Family",
        "7011": "Music",
        "7012": "Puzzle",
        "7013": "Racing",
        "7014": "Role Playing",
        "7015": "Simulation",
        "7016": "Sports",
        "7017": "Strategy",
        "7018": "Trivia",
        "7019": "Word",
        "game": "Game",
        "game_action": "Action",
        "game_adventure": "Adventure",
        "game_arcade": "Arcade",
        "game_board": "Board",
        "game_card": "Card",
        "game_casino": "Casino",
        "game_casual": "Casual",
        "game_educational": "Educational",
        "game_music": "Music",
        "game_puzzle": "Puzzle",
        "game_racing": "Racing",
        "game_role_playing": "Role Playing",
        "game_simulation": "Simulation",
        "game_sports": "Sports",
        "game_strategy": "Strategy",
        "game_trivia": "Trivia",
        "game_word": "Word",

      };
      return mapping[id] || "Unknown";
    })
) }}

apps.name: Smash Guy: Cannon Shooter
apps.short_description: Tap and aim the cannon to launch the ball and beat your target
apps.description:
Smash Guy: Cannon Shooter is an action-packed, physics-based punching game where power meets fun!
Launch your hero like a cannonball, charge your punch, and send enemies flying through walls, buildings, and obstacles. Each hit feels satisfying with realistic ragdoll physics and explosive impact effects that make every level pure chaos and joy! 💥

💪 Simple to play, impossible to stop!
Just tap, aim, and smash easy to learn but crazy fun to master. Unlock new levels, upgrade your strength, and discover hilarious ways to destroy enemies. Feel the thrill of becoming the ultimate smash hero in this addictive one-punch action game.

🎯 Why Players Love Smash Guy:

⚡ Super-satisfying punch & smash mechanics
😎 Funny ragdoll physics and realistic reactions
🧱 Destructible environments with epic slow-motion impacts
💥 Charge your power and break everything in your way
🥇 Unlock new skins, levels, and powerful upgrades

Whether you love Smash Guy Punch Games, Smash and Tear the Annoying Guy offline Games, Break Ragdoll Physics Games, or just want some stress relief Smash Guy: Cannon Shooter delivers nonstop fun, quick play sessions, and rewarding gameplay that keeps you coming back for more!

🚀 Be the strongest smash guy and show your power with every punch!
Ready to smash them all? Download now and start punching your way to victory!

apps.name: Ice Fishing
apps.short_description: Cool ice fishing game with realistic AI fish and spectacular rare catch effects!
apps.description:
Ice Fishing - Premium Casual Fishing Experience
Test your reflexes and timing in this polished ice fishing game. Drop your line through an ice hole and catch as many fish as you can in 60 seconds!
GAMEPLAY

Drop your fishing line with a simple tap
Wait for fish to bite and watch for the visual indicators
Tap the HOOK button when you see the bite alert
Reel in your catch before the line breaks
Each fish has different behaviors and point values

FISH TYPES
Discover 5 different fish species, each with unique characteristics:

Perch - Common and easier to catch
Trout - Moves faster, requires good timing
Pike - Rare catch with quick movements
Salmon - Even rarer with challenging behavior
Golden Trout - Legendary fish with spectacular catch animation

When you catch rare fish, enjoy stunning visual effects including light streaks, particle animations, and cinematic presentations.
DIFFICULTY LEVELS
Choose your challenge:

Easy Mode - Slower fish, longer reaction time, perfect for learning
Normal Mode - Balanced difficulty for regular play
Hard Mode - Fast fish, quick reactions needed, for experts

PREMIUM FEATURES

Smooth 60 FPS gameplay with no lag
Beautiful frosted glass UI design
Animated snow particles and ice shimmer effects
Natural fish AI with curved swimming paths
Rod tension physics - careful not to break your line!
Persistent statistics tracking across sessions
Haptic feedback for immersive experience

GAME MODES

Timed Challenge - 60 second sessions to maximize your score
Track your best score and total fish caught
See how many rare fish you've discovered

NO ADS, NO IAP
This is a complete game with no advertisements and no in-app purchases. What you download is what you get - a premium fishing experience.
CONTROLS
Simple and intuitive:

Tap DROP LINE to cast
Wait for fish to approach your bait
Watch for the bright red FISH BITING alert
Tap HOOK to catch the fish
Tap REEL IN to bring it up

Clear on-screen instructions guide you every step of the way.
STATISTICS
Track your progress:

Total fish caught
Rare fish discovered
Best score achieved
Total time played

SETTINGS
Customize your experience:

Adjust difficulty level
Toggle vibration feedback
Graphics quality options

ABOUT
Ice Fishing is designed for quick gaming sessions. Perfect for:

Short breaks during the day
Casual gaming sessions
Testing your reflexes
Relaxing with beautiful animations

The game features clean architecture, optimized performance, and attention to detail in every animation. We've focused on creating a smooth, responsive experience that feels premium from the moment you start playing.
TECHNICAL HIGHLIGHTS

Built with modern Android development practices
Optimized battery usage
Smooth animations with advanced easing curves
No lag or frame drops
Persistent data saving

Download Ice Fishing today and experience casual fishing gaming done right. No tricks, no gimmicks - just a well-crafted game that respects your time and device.

apps.name: Cybele Vasotonic
apps.short_description: Welcome to join Cybele Vasotonic
apps.description:
## Game Features

- **Simple and Intuitive Controls:** Simply tap the screen to plant and harvest.

- **Diverse Crops:** Wheat, carrots, watermelons, pumpkins, and many other crops are available to plant.

- **Weather System:** Dynamic weather changes affect crop growth speed.

- **Task System:** Complete daily tasks to earn extra rewards.

- **Leveling System:** Gain experience points through planting and harvesting to level up and unlock more content.

- **Shop System:** Purchase seeds and expand your land.

- **Inventory Management:** Manage your harvested crops and purchased items.

## Basic Gameplay

### Start the Game

1. Click "START GAME" on the welcome screen to enter the main game interface.

2. The main game interface displays your farm, with coins, level, and energy information displayed at the top.

3. The bottom features a seed selection bar and function buttons.

### Planting and Harvesting

1. **Planting Crops:**

- Select the crop seed you want to plant at the bottom.

- Click on an empty plot of land to plant.

- Planting requires energy and seeds.

2. **Harvesting Crops:**

- Once crops are mature (displayed as green with a maturity indicator), click "Harvest".

- Harvested crops will be automatically added to your inventory.

- You will also receive coins and experience points.

### Weather System

The weather in the game will change randomly, and different weather conditions will have different effects on crop growth:

- **Sunny Day**: Crops grow at normal speed

- **Cloudy Day**: Crops grow slightly slower

- **Rainy Day**: Crops grow faster

- **Stormy Day**: Crops grow significantly slower

### Task System

1. Click the "DAILY TASKS" button at the bottom to view daily tasks.

2. Task types include:

- Planting a specific number of crops

- Harvesting a specific number of crops

- Earning a certain amount of coins

- Unlocking new land

3. After completing a task, click "CLAIM" to claim your reward (coins and experience points).

4. Click "REFRESH" to refresh the task list.

### Inventory Management

1. Click the "INVENTORY" button at the bottom to open the inventory interface.

2. Inventory displays all crops and items you own.

3. Click on a single item to sell it.

4. Use the "SELL" button to sell one of each crop.

5. Use the "SELL ALL" button to sell all crops.

### Shop System

1. Click the "SHOP" button at the bottom to open the shop.

2. The shop offers the following items:

- Seeds for various crops

- Expansion licenses (unlock new land)

### Upgrade System

1. Gain experience points by planting, harvesting, and completing tasks.

2. Automatically level up after accumulating enough experience points.

3. Leveling up unlocks new crops and features.

apps.name: Little Cow Lucky Fishing
apps.short_description: Welcome to join Little Cow Lucky Fishing
apps.description:
## Game Features

- **Exquisite Graphics:** Utilizes 2D graphics technology for a fresh and natural look.
- **Realistic Fishing Experience:** Includes realistic fishing actions such as charging, casting, and reeling in.

- **Various Fish Species:** Small fish, medium fish, large fish, and special fish; different fish have different score values.

- **Level System:** Multiple levels await your challenge, each with different target scores and time limits.

- **Character Customization:** Supports multiple character color options (blue, red, yellow).

- **Sound Effects System:** Complete game sound effects enhance the gaming experience.

- **Leaderboard System:** Records your highest score and allows you to compete with friends.

## Gameplay

### Basic Controls

1. **Charging and Casting:**

- Click the "Cast" button to start charging.

- The charge bar will swing back and forth; choose the right time to release.

- The fuller the charge, the farther the cast.

2. **Depth Control:**

- Use the "+" and "-" buttons to adjust the hook depth.

- Different fish species are found at different depths.

- Finding areas with dense fish populations makes it easier to catch fish.

3. **Reeling in**:

- Click the "Reel in" button to reel in the hook.

- If you catch a fish, it will be automatically added to your catch.

- Be mindful of the time limit and allocate your time wisely.

### Fish System

- **Small Fish**: 1 point, most common, easy to catch.

- **Medium Fish**: 5 points, medium difficulty, requires some skill.

- **Large Fish**: 10 points, harder to catch, requires precise depth control.

- **Special Fish**: 20 points, very rare, requires a combination of luck and skill.

### Game Mechanics

- **Time Limit**: Each level has a time limit; you need to reach the target score within the specified time.

- **Target Score**: Each level has a different target score requirement.

- **Coin System**: Catching fish earns coins, which can be used to purchase items and upgrade equipment.

- **Item System:** Various items in the game can help you fish more effectively.

## Character System

The game offers three different colored characters to choose from:

- **Blue Character:** Classic color scheme, suitable for novice players.

- **Red Character:** Passionate color scheme, full of energy.

- **Yellow Character:** Bright color scheme, giving a warm feeling.

apps.description: In this color matching puzzle game, click on balls of the same color to remove them and get points. The more colors you remove at once, the higher your score. Keep playing until you can't move anymore. It's easy to play and fun.

apps.name: Snake Feast
apps.short_description: Can you set a new high score?
apps.description: Enjoy the timeless snake gameplay. Eat as many balls as possible to grow your snake without limits. Stay away from walls and your own tail. Can you set a new high score?

apps.name: Goose Hop
apps.short_description: Experience the unique homecoming of a brave schoolgirl boxer.
apps.description: Experience the unique homecoming of a brave schoolgirl boxer. Jump from one goose to another in this exciting endless runner. Master the art of flight and never fall!
